mapper.select: SELECT S.ID AS ID, S.NAME AS NAME, S.CONTACT AS CONTACT, S.PHONE_NUMBER AS PHONE_NUMBER, S.ADDRESS AS ADDRESS, S.IS_ACTIVE AS IS_ACTIVE FROM SUPPLIER S ORDER BY S.ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SUPPLIER (NAME, CONTACT, PHONE_NUMBER, ADDRESS, IS_ACTIVE) VALUES (#{supplier.name}, #{supplier.contact}, #{supplier.phoneNumber}, #{supplier.address}, #{supplier.isActive})
mapper.select: SELECT S.ID AS ID, S.NAME AS NAME, S.CONTACT AS CONTACT, S.PHONE_NUMBER AS PHONE_NUMBER, S.ADDRESS AS ADDRESS, S.IS_ACTIVE AS IS_ACTIVE FROM SUPPLIER S WHERE ID = #{ id }
mapper.update: UPDATE SUPPLIER SET NAME = #{supplier.name}, CONTACT = #{supplier.contact}, PHONE_NUMBER = #{supplier.phoneNumber}, ADDRESS = #{supplier.address}, IS_ACTIVE = #{supplier.isActive} WHERE ID = #{id}
